ddls:
CREATE TABLE "polyhedra" (
  "polyhedron_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each polyhedron */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the polyhedron */,
  "symmetry" TEXT /* Type of spatial symmetry (e.g., Td, Oh, Ih) */,
  "num_vertices" INTEGER /* Number of vertices in the polyhedron */,
  "num_edges" INTEGER /* Number of edges in the polyhedron */,
  "num_faces" INTEGER /* Number of faces in the polyhedron */,
  "volume" REAL /* Volume of the polyhedron */,
  "surface_area" REAL /* Surface area of the polyhedron */,
  "diameter" REAL /* Diameter of the polyhedron */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the polyhedron */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the polyhedron record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the polyhedron record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("polyhedron_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polyhedra_symmetry FOREIGN KEY ("symmetry") REFERENCES symmetries ("symmetry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "symmetries" (
  "symmetry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each symmetry */,
  "symmetry_name" TEXT /* Name of the symmetry (e.g., Td, Oh, Ih) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the symmetry */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order of the symmetry group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the symmetry record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the symmetry record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symmetry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faces" (
  "face_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each face */,
  "polyhedron_id" INTEGER /* ID of the polyhedron the face belongs to */,
  "num_sides" INTEGER /* Number of sides in the face */,
  "face_type" TEXT /* Type of face (e.g., triangular, square) */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the face */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the face record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the face record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("face_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faces_polyhedron_id FOREIGN KEY ("polyhedron_id") REFERENCES polyhedra ("polyhedron_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "edges" (
  "edge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each edge */,
  "polyhedron_id" INTEGER /* ID of the polyhedron the edge belongs to */,
  "num_vertices" INTEGER /* Number of vertices in the edge */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the edge */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the edge record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the edge record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("edge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_edges_polyhedron_id FOREIGN KEY ("polyhedron_id") REFERENCES polyhedra ("polyhedron_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vertices" (
  "vertex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vertex */,
  "polyhedron_id" INTEGER /* ID of the polyhedron the vertex belongs to */,
  "num_edges" INTEGER /* Number of edges adjacent to the vertex */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Coordinates of the vertex in 3D space */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the vertex record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the vertex record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vertex_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vertices_polyhedron_id FOREIGN KEY ("polyhedron_id") REFERENCES polyhedra ("polyhedron_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_papers" (
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research paper */,
  "polyhedron_id" INTEGER /* ID of the polyhedron the paper is associated with */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the research paper */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the research paper */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the paper was published */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the research paper */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier for the paper */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the paper record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the paper record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("paper_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_papers_polyhedron_id FOREIGN KEY ("polyhedron_id") REFERENCES polyhedra ("polyhedron_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each note */,
  "polyhedron_id" INTEGER /* ID of the polyhedron the note is associated with */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text of the note */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the note */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the note was created */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the note is public */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the note was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the note */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notes_polyhedron_id FOREIGN KEY ("polyhedron_id") REFERENCES polyhedra ("polyhedron_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, contributor) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user is affiliated with */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributions" (
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contribution */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the contribution */,
  "polyhedron_id" INTEGER /* ID of the polyhedron the contribution is associated with */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of contribution (e.g., research paper, note) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the contribution was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the contribution (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the contribution was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the contribution record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contributions_polyhedron_id FOREIGN KEY ("polyhedron_id") REFERENCES polyhedra ("polyhedron_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classification" (
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classification */,
  "polyhedron_id" INTEGER /* ID of the polyhedron being classified */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the polyhedron (e.g., regular, semi-regular) */,
  "subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory of the polyhedron (e.g., tetrahedral, octahedral) */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the classification in the hierarchy */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the classification record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the classification record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classification_polyhedron_id FOREIGN KEY ("polyhedron_id") REFERENCES polyhedra ("polyhedron_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classification_subcategory FOREIGN KEY ("subcategory") REFERENCES subcategories ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classification_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., regular, semi-regular) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "is_parent" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the category is a parent category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (nullable) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the category record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the category record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subcategory */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the subcategory (e.g., tetrahedral, octahedral) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subcategory */,
  "is_parent" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the subcategory is a parent subcategory */,
  "parent_subcategory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent subcategory (nullable) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the subcategory record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the subcategory record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "polyhedron1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first polyhedron in the relationship */,
  "polyhedron2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second polyhedron in the relationship */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., dual, similar) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the relationship */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the relationship record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the relationship record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relationships_polyhedron2_id FOREIGN KEY ("polyhedron2_id") REFERENCES polyhedra ("polyhedron_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relationships_polyhedron1_id FOREIGN KEY ("polyhedron1_id") REFERENCES polyhedra ("polyhedron_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "duals" (
  "dual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dual */,
  "polyhedron_id" INTEGER /* ID of the polyhedron */,
  "dual_polyhedron_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dual polyhedron */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the dual record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the dual record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_duals_dual_polyhedron_id FOREIGN KEY ("dual_polyhedron_id") REFERENCES polyhedra ("polyhedron_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_duals_polyhedron_id FOREIGN KEY ("polyhedron_id") REFERENCES polyhedra ("polyhedron_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "similar_polyhedra" (
  "similar_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each similar polyhedron */,
  "polyhedron_id" INTEGER /* ID of the polyhedron */,
  "similar_polyhedron_id" INTEGER /* ID of the similar polyhedron */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the similar polyhedron record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the similar polyhedron record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("similar_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_similar_polyhedra_polyhedron_id FOREIGN KEY ("polyhedron_id") REFERENCES polyhedra ("polyhedron_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_similar_polyhedra_similar_polyhedron_id FOREIGN KEY ("similar_polyhedron_id") REFERENCES polyhedra ("polyhedron_id")
)
